series_metadata.series_description: Applications, Executive Director review form, board rosters, supporting documents, approval letters, rejection letters, resignation letters, and vacate letters.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until the end of the biennium (June 30) occurring no sooner than two years after the last day of the appointment term. ; Paper: Retain until the end of the biennium (June 30) occurring no sooner than two years after the last day of the appointment term., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
